title: Spicy Creamy American Chicken Burger
description: A post-workout American dish featuring spicy and creamy flavors, with a twist of golden syrup and tandoor spices. This egg-free-friendly burger is perfect for those looking for a filling and flavorful meal.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a bowl, mix together tandoor spice mix, golden syrup, and a pinch of salt.
Add the spice mix to the chicken patties and coat evenly.
Grill the chicken patties for 5-6 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 165°F.
In a bowl, mix together mayonnaise and sriracha sauce.
Toast the brioche buns on the grill or in a toaster.
Assemble the burgers by spreading the spicy mayonnaise on the bottom bun, followed by a chicken patty, a slice of cheese, some shredded lettuce, sliced red onion, and sliced tomatoes.
Let the burgers rest for a few minutes before serving.
